articles.title: Uzbekistan Discusses Geological Exploration Cooperation with ITOCHU and JOGMEC
articles.summary_raw: Uzbekistan held talks with Japan’s ITOCHU and JOGMEC on expanding cooperation in geological exploration, mining development, and investment in mineral resources.

articles.title: President of Uzbekistan proposes to ADB expanding projects in AI, energy, minerals and logistics
articles.summary_raw: President of Uzbekistan, speaking at the ADB Board of Governors meeting, proposed to expand cooperation in AI, green energy, logistics digitalization, critical minerals, climate and tourism projects in Central Asia. He noted that global conflicts were raising transport costs by as up to 30%.
